cybersecurity.title: BeaconHunter
cybersecurity.description: A memory scanner targeting Cobalt Strike and Brute Ratel beacons. Locates obfuscated payload regions in active memory structures by searching for reflective DLL loaders and shellcode patterns.

cybersecurity.title: AegisGuard
cybersecurity.description: An automated Active Directory security auditing toolkit. Maps delegation path abuses, Kerberoasting exposures, and dangerous domain ACL configurations.

cybersecurity.title: ValkyrieRootkit
cybersecurity.description: A kernel-mode SSDT hooking and EPT-based shadow memory supervisor proof of concept. Explores memory access monitoring and driver detection bypasses.

cybersecurity.title: HadesHoney
cybersecurity.description: A low-interaction SSH honeypot that catches brute-force payloads and logs attack signatures, feeding geolocation and IP reputation metrics directly to threat intelligence feeds.

cybersecurity.title: PhishTrigger
cybersecurity.description: A phishing simulation platform built to test organization email security. Supports custom templates, click-through metric tracking, and smart mail relay scheduling.

cybersecurity.title: NetWhisper
cybersecurity.description: A secure network exfiltration tool using DNS query TXT records and ICMP payloads to establish a covert command-and-control connection through restrictive firewalls.

others.title: TaskFlow
others.description: A collaborative Kanban-style project management board featuring real-time task drag-and-drop, glassmorphic layout styling, and comprehensive task analytics widgets.

others.title: FinTrack
others.description: A premium dashboard application for tracking personal income, expenses, and savings goals. Features interactive charts, monthly progress indicators, and secure financial analytics.
